name: visual-prompt
description: Create high-converting AI image prompts for Midjourney, DALL-E, and Sora to match your marketing strategy
logic: Step 1: Check brand-voice.md for brand consistency.
Step 2: Determine visual style (Minimalist, Cyberpunk, Cinematic, Abstract, High-Fashion).
Step 3: Map marketing-triggers.json to visual elements (e.g., Urgency -> Warm colors, curiosity -> shadows/composition).
Step 4: Generate 3 distinct Midjourney/DALL-E prompt variations.
Step 5: Finalize with a Psychology Breakdown for the visual appeal.

parameter_validation.topic: The main subject of the image
